area_name: Nanyang Primary School 1km balloting zone â€” King's Road / Coronation, District 10 (Bukit Timah)
summary: 【2026-07-03 刷新 / refreshed】Nanyang Primary（52 King's Road, S268097）是 SAP 名校、原九所 GEP 中心之一——注意：MOE 已宣布 GEP 停办（2026 年为最后一届 P4 入选，2027 年起由全校 HAL + 15 校 Advanced Modules 取代），「GEP 学区溢价」逻辑弱化，但 SAP 品牌与 1km 抽签稀缺仍在：2025 年 Phase 2C 为 63 人争 42 位（150%，抽签），2026 年结果 8 月 11 日才公布。区域为 D10 永久地契 landed 核心（King's / Coronation / Namly / Kingsmead），Master Plan 2025 已于 2025-12-01 正式生效，环内 landed 分区不变。市场面：URA landed 指数 2026 Q1 环比 -0.4%（终结 2025 Q4 的 +3.4%），3M SORA 降至约 1.05-1.08%（2 年固定约 1.27-1.40%）——买方谈判筹码增强、月供压力大减。外围 Turf City 首两幅 GLS 高价成交（S$1,410 → S$1,625 psf ppr），首盘 Dunearn House（380 户，约 S$2,900-3,100 psf）2026-07-10 VVIP 预览；CRL 二期（Turf City CR14 / King Albert Park CR15）2032 年通车。King's Road（Prince-Lutheran 段）2025-04 洪水记录仍未解除，Bukit Timah 运河扩容目标 2026 年完工但 2026-02 Dunearn Road 仍有洪水预警。 —— [EN] Nanyang Primary's 1km ring remains D10's freehold-landed core. July-2026 shifts: GEP is being discontinued (last P4 intake 2026; HAL + Advanced Modules from 2027), so the school premium now rests on the SAP brand and 1km balloting scarcity (2025 P2C 63/42; 2026 result due 11 Aug 2026). URA's landed index dipped 0.4% q/q in Q1 2026 while 3M SORA collapsed to ~1.05%, tilting negotiating power to buyers. Turf City's first launches (Dunearn House, ~S$2,900-3,100 psf, VVIP preview 10 Jul 2026) reprice the periphery; CRL Phase 2 (CR14/CR15) opens 2032. King's Road's flash-flood record stands until the Bukit Timah canal works complete.

regulatory: ABSD 2026 (CONFIRMED, unchanged since 27 Apr 2023): Citizen 0%/20%/30% (1st/2nd/3rd+ property); PR 5%/30%/35%; Foreigner flat 60% regardless of property count; Entities 65%. Source: https://res.edmundeeadvisory.com/guides/absd-singapore-2026, https://www.iras.gov.sg/taxes/stamp-duty/for-property/buying-or-acquiring-property/additional-buyer's-stamp-duty-(absd)

SSD (CONFIRMED, 4-yr regime effective properties bought on/after 4 Jul 2025 12:00am): 16% (sold within yr1) / 12% (yr2) / 8% (yr3) / 4% (yr4) / 0% (after yr4); rates raised 4ppt per tier and holding period extended from 3 to 4 years; HDB unaffected (MOP). Source: https://www.mas.gov.sg/news/media-releases/2025/extension-of-the-holding-period-of-sellers-stamp-duty-and-higher-ssd-rates

LDAU foreign landed ownership (CORRECTED size cap): ≥5-yr PR + exceptional economic contribution required, case-by-case; S$1,220 application fee; ~1 month to process (some cases 2-6 months); owner-occupier only, no renting (existing tenancy at purchase must end within 1 year of completion); cannot sell within 5 years of legal completion; GCB Areas entirely off-limits to foreign buyers. SIZE CAP CORRECTION: mainland restricted residential property cap is 15,000 sqft (~1,394 sqm), NOT 1,800 sqm as stated in v1 — 1,800 sqm is the separate, larger cap that applies only to Sentosa Cove (Singapore's sole foreign-open waterfront landed enclave, which itself has no 5-year no-sell restriction). Source: https://singaporelegaladvice.com/foreigners-buying-landed-residential-property-singapore/, https://www.sla.gov.sg/regulatory/foreign-ownership-of-property/

Financing mid-2026 (UPDATED, v1 figure now stale): 3-month compounded SORA has fallen sharply to ~1.05-1.08% as of June 2026 (from a ~2.9-3% peak in 2025/early-2026) — v1's '~1.55-1.80%' estimate is now too high. Fixed mortgage packages have followed rates down; some 2-year fixed packages advertised as low as ~1.27-1.40% p.a. by June 2026 (vs. ~3.45-3.75% quoted for an April 2026 snapshot in one source — sources vary on the April figure but agree on the steep June decline). LTV 75% and TDSR 55% stress-tested at a 4% floor remain in force per MAS rules — re-run affordability stress tests against the lower actual-rate environment. Sources: https://www.homejourney.sg/blog/singapore-sora-rate-outlook-2026-what-homeowners-should-know-homejourney-202601110702, https://housingloansg.com/hl/charts/sora-and-compounded-sora-trend, https://propertynet.sg/latest-bank-mortgage-loan-rates-across-singapore/

URA landed price index (UPDATED, material change from v1 framing): landed property prices DECREASED 0.4% q/q in Q1 2026, reversing +3.4% q/q growth in Q4 2025; non-landed rose +1.3% q/q in the same quarter — a landed/non-landed divergence, with landed cooling into 2026. Q2 2026 index not yet published as of this research (typically released late Jul/Aug). Sources: https://www.ura.gov.sg/Corporate/Media-Room/Media-Releases/pr26-31, https://www.ura.gov.sg/Corporate/Media-Room/Media-Releases/pr26-26

D10 landed liquidity/market read (CONFIRMED): resale volumes reported steady through 2023-2026 cooling-measure rounds (owner-occupier-driven, not speculative); D10 land supply for new landed/condo stock remains extremely limited, structurally supporting prices despite the Q1 2026 index dip. Source: https://www.plbinsights.com/unpacking-district-10s-pure-landed-homes-price-growth-and-investment-opportunities/

screening_recommendations.title: 先等 8/11 的 2026 抽签结果 / Wait for the 11 Aug ballot print
screening_recommendations.detail: 2026 Phase 2C 注册 7 月底进行、结果 2026-08-11 公布。为学区付溢价的买家，签 OTP 前先看这份数据——若 MOE 全国减招（-1,460 位）落在 Nanyang，竞争率可能不降反升；反之若走弱，学区溢价议价空间加大。

screening_recommendations.title: 重估 GEP 溢价 / Re-price the GEP factor
screening_recommendations.detail: GEP 2026 年后停办（改 HAL + 15 校 Advanced Modules）。Nanyang 的稀缺叙事从「SAP+GEP 双料」降为「SAP + 1km 抽签」——它仍是顶级学区，但和其他 SAP 校的差距收窄；出价时不要按旧叙事给满价。

screening_recommendations.title: 用 Q1 转跌 + 低息做谈判 / Use the Q1 dip + cheap money
screening_recommendations.detail: URA landed 指数 Q1 2026 -0.4% 环比转跌，而卖方要价仍停在 2025 高位（如 Belmont 双 GCB 要价 psf 高于同路 2025-12 成交价）。SORA ~1.05% 令月供大减——把省下的融资成本用作出价纪律而非追价理由；对挂牌 >90 天的房源大胆低于要价出价。

screening_recommendations.title: 洪水段逐户核验 / Verify flood exposure house-by-house
screening_recommendations.detail: King's Road（Prince-Lutheran 段）与 Coronation Walk 2025-04 有洪水实录；Dunearn 走廊 2026-02 仍有 PUB 预警；运河扩容（目标 2026 完工）尚未确认完工。该几段房源：现场看 platform level 与排水，暴雨后复看，完工前不为「近校门」付满价。

screening_recommendations.title: 外国人限制（v1 勘误）/ Foreign-buyer rules (corrects v1)
screening_recommendations.detail: LDAU 批准制：≥5 年 PR + 特殊经济贡献，仅自住、5 年内不得转售；本岛受限住宅面积上限为 15,000 sqft（约 1,394 m²）——v1 写的 1,800 m² 是 Sentosa Cove 专属标准，已更正。GCBA 对外国人完全关闭。卖方受众基本为公民/获批 PR，定价与流动性按此评估。

screening_recommendations.title: 可疑数据先核实 / Screen the suspect numbers first
screening_recommendations.detail: 99.co 新抓取中两条 Kingsmead 房源的 psf 异常（S$5,333 疑为建筑面积口径）、PropertyGuru 22802877 未披露地块面积——凡 land vs built-up 口径不明的，OneMap/INLIS 核实地块面积后再比价，防止错误 psf 进入比较集。

screening_recommendations.title: 榜单两端的机会 / The two ends of the ranked list
screening_recommendations.detail: 大地块玩法：24 Kingsmead Rd（12,168 sqft，S$1,972 psf land，URA 已批 10,000+ sqft GFA）低于 detached 基准带下沿，适合重建/多代同堂。量子入场：Prince of Wales Rd 半独立 S$6.0m（S$1,708 psf）为本轮最低总价，但地处 1km 边缘、街区档次 mid——签约前 OneMap 实测与 52 King's Rd 直线距离。

screening_recommendations.title: 用 Dunearn House 做 psf 参照系 / Benchmark against Dunearn House
screening_recommendations.detail: Turf City 首盘约 S$2,900-3,100 psf（99 年地契公寓）。环内永久地契 landed 的地价 psf（S$1,800-2,800）低于新盘建筑面积 psf——这是 landed 价值主张的量化底气；若 Dunearn House 热卖，外围重定价将托底 landed 长期价值。

screening_recommendations.title: 逐套打分 + 产权尽调 / Score each candidate + title checks
screening_recommendations.detail: 候选房源跑 researcher/landed/scorecard.py（0-100 + 红黄旗），<65 分不看房；出价前 SLA INLIS 查产权/地役权/限制契据，重建候选加查 URA 分区与保育名单（Cornwall/Chatsworth 部分洋房受保育限制）。

screening_recommendations.title: 按 SSD 新规规划持有期 / Plan holding around the 4-yr SSD
screening_recommendations.detail: 2025-07-04 起 SSD 为 4 年 16/12/8/4%。学区自住通常持有 ≥6 年（P1-P6）不受影响，但若计划「用完学额即卖」，第 4 年内出售将吃 4-16% 卖方印花税——现金流测算需计入。

zoning_planning_notes: Most of the tight 1km ring (King's Rd, Coronation Rd/West, Prince/Princess of Wales) remains URA 'Landed Housing' (non-GCBA): 2–3 storeys, semi-D/terrace/detached permitted, setbacks vary by road type — UNCHANGED under the now-gazetted Master Plan 2025 (adopted 1 Dec 2025); no landed-zoning revision found specific to this ring.

URA Master Plan 2025 status update: formally GAZETTED on 1 December 2025 (no longer 'draft') after Singapore's largest-ever public engagement exercise, becoming the official land-use blueprint for the next 10–15 years. [https://www.ura.gov.sg/Corporate/Media-Room/Media-Releases/pr25-64]

GCBA plots (Leedon Park, Bin Tong, Belmont upper, Cornwall, Chatsworth): unchanged — detached only, min 1,400 sqm, ~35–40% coverage, 2-storey+attic, 3m setbacks; subdivision below 1,400 sqm not allowed. Confirmed still 39 gazetted GCB Areas islandwide (~2,700–2,800 GCB units total) with no boundary revisions as of 2026.

Conservation overlay on parts of Cornwall Gardens (27 bungalows) and Chatsworth Park limits demolition; subdividing conserved plots requires residual ≥1,000 sqm / conserved ≥1,800 sqm. Separately, MP2025 gazetted 33 buildings for conservation nationally (economy/housing/social/defence themes), plus 22 heritage buildings specifically within the Turf City site (Grandstands, stables, Saddle Club, Dunearn Water Depot) to be repurposed as community nodes.
Belmont Road is a blended zone — GCBA (premium) plus non-GCBA semi-D — so zoning and price tier vary plot by plot. Unchanged.

Low en-bloc/GLS pressure inside the 1km landed core itself; redevelopment intensity remains concentrated at the periphery (Turf City, Holland Plain). No en-bloc activity identified inside the ring or on its immediate condo fringe for 2025–2026; Watten Estate's en-bloc (UOL/SingLand, S$550.8m) was already completed in 2021 and is now the 'Watten House' project referenced elsewhere in this digest.
future_planning: Bukit Timah Turf City (176 ha): 15,000–20,000 public+private homes, first new HDB flats in Bukit Timah in ~40 years; 22 heritage buildings conserved (Grandstands, stables, Saddle Club, Dunearn Water Depot). DMP2025 (now gazetted) demarcates ~20 residential sites + 3 white sites (one linked to future Turf City MRT) + a school site + a healthcare site. Phasing spans 20–30 years overall, BUT the FIRST PRIVATE LAUNCH is already dated: 'Dunearn House' (Frasers Property/Sekisui House/CSC Land JV; GLS site sold Jul 2025 for S$491.45m / S$1,410 psf ppr) — 380 units (2BR–4BR, 530–1,380 sqft), priced ~S$2,900–3,100 psf, VVIP preview reported ~10 Jul 2026. A SECOND Turf City/Dunearn Road GLS site (330 units + ground-floor retail) was awarded to a Wing Tai-Metro JV at S$1,625 psf ppr (28 Apr 2026 tender, 15% above the first site) — confirms escalating land cost as the precinct's first phase fills in. BTO component still expected to align later, roughly with CRL Phase 2 completion.

Cross Island Line Phase 2 (opens 2032): CORRECTED station codes — Turf City station is CR14 (not CR13; CR13 is Bright Hill, an unrelated Phase-1 interchange further east); King Albert Park is CR15, interchange with Downtown Line (DT6), reportedly Singapore's deepest station (~50m). Phase 2 spans 6 stations (Turf City to Jurong Lake District); groundbreaking held 7 Jul 2025 at Clementi. As of March 2026, King Albert Park's earth-retaining/stabilising works were underway — near-term Blackmore Drive construction disruption continues.

Holland Plain GLS: Sim Lian won BOTH adjacent sites — 1st (~S$368m, S$1,423 psf ppr) and 2nd (~S$454m, S$1,491 psf ppr, sole bid, awarded 7 May 2026, ~280 homes, 169,175 sqft site / 304,524 sqft max GFA). Possible amalgamation into a combined ~510-unit development; indicative launch psf S$2,950–3,150, likely selling 2027–2028; adds new high-rise supply and overlapping MGS 1km school demand.

PUB Bukit Timah Canal widening/deepening (Rifle Range Rd–Jalan Kampong Chantek) completing ~2026 to handle ~30% more rainwater; reassess flood risk post-completion. (Unchanged from v1 — no updated completion-date confirmation found this pass.)

URA Master Plan 2025 (now GAZETTED, not draft, since 1 Dec 2025) emphasises heritage conservation, car-lite design and green corridors across the broader Bukit Timah district; Kranji (former racecourse) is undergoing a parallel racecourse-to-housing transformation, an interesting precedent/comparator for Turf City's pacing.
schools_within_1km: Nanyang Primary School — 52 King's Road, 268097 (subject school); SAP school since 1984; was one of 9 original GEP centres since 1990 — NOTE: GEP is being discontinued nationally, last P4 GEP intake 2026, last cohort completes 2028, replaced from 2027 by school-based Higher-Ability-Learner (HAL) provisions (all primary schools, ~10% of cohort) + after-school Advanced Modules at 15 designated centres [confirmed, sgschoolkaki.com/blog/gep-discontinued-advanced-modules-2027, honeykidsasia.com/gifted-programme-gep-moe-changes-primary-school]
Nanyang Primary Phase 2C balloting — 2025: 63 applicants / 42 places (150.0% demand ratio, balloted, SC <1km) — CONFIRMED matches v1 [kiasuparents.com/kiasu/primary-schools/nanyang-primary-school]

Nanyang Primary Phase 2C balloting — 2024: 79 applicants / 40 places (197.5% demand ratio, balloted, SC <1km) — CONFIRMED matches v1; longer history 2022 ratio 2.17:1, 2023 1.73:1, all balloted SC<1km [kiasuparents.com, p1registration.sg/2025/05/07/nanyang-primary-balloting-history-your-2025-chances-strategies]

Nanyang Primary Phase 2C balloting — 2026: UNVERIFIABLE/PENDING — registration window ~28-30 Jul 2026, results due 11 Aug 2026, i.e. AFTER this report's date (2026-07-02); do not infer outcome from prior years

MOE 2026 P1 intake reduction (NEW, not in v1): starting with the 2026 P1 Registration Exercise, MOE is gradually cutting P1 intake at most primary schools nationally in response to falling cohort sizes from 2027 onward — reported aggregate: 61 schools cut, 12 increased, 106 unchanged, net -1,460 P1 places nationwide; Nanyang/RGPS-specific 2026 vacancy figures not found in official press release text, check MOE P1 portal directly [moe.gov.sg/news/press-releases/20260429-2026-primary-one-registration-exercise]
Nanyang Kindergarten — 118 King's Road, 268155 (on/adjacent campus, affiliated) — unchanged from v1

Raffles Girls' Primary School — 21 Hillcrest Road (~1-1.2km, near edge); also one of the 9 original GEP centres (same 2027 discontinuation applies); required balloting in Phase 2C both 2024 and 2025, fully subscribed with 0 vacancies left for Phase 2C Supplementary either year; Phase 2B ratio >3:1 across distance bands [p1registration.sg/2025/05/07/raffles-girls-primary-school-rgps-balloting-history-your-2025-chances-strategies, kiasuparents.com/kiasu/primary-schools/raffles-girls-primary-school]
Nanyang Girls' High School — 2 Linden Drive (~1-1.5km; IP with Hwa Chong) — unchanged from v1, not re-verified this cycle
data_gaps: 2026 年 Phase 2C 抽签结果 2026-08-11 才公布——本报告的学区需求判断基于 2022-2025 数据（均抽签）。
Bukit Timah 运河扩容工程（Rifle Range Rd-Jalan Kampong Chantek）官方完工确认未找到；2026-02 Dunearn 洪水预警说明风险仍活跃。
Coronation Road West 价格带（v1 引 EdgeProp）本轮 403 无法独立复核——标记 provisional，出价前用 URA REALIS 复核。
99.co 两条 Kingsmead 房源与 PropertyGuru 22802877 的地块面积/psf 口径未确认（疑为建筑面积）。
校门口 King's Road 接送拥堵无直接来源佐证（标记 unverifiable）——现场早晚高峰各看一次。
